template.time: Unix epoch milliseconds when the payload is issued

Datalink.IN.summary: Decoded hivelink frames coming from physical datalinks

data.interface: Transport name such as udp, multicast, meshtastic
data.source: Remote node id that sent the frame

Datalink.OUT.summary: Unencoded hivelink messages that should be encoded and forwarded

data.destination: Target node id or empty for broadcast
data.payload: Dictionary of payload fields for the chosen message

MSP.REQUEST.summary: Base prefix for MSP requests; 'op' field selects the MSP operation

data.op: string identifier for requested MSP operation

MSP.REPLY.summary: Base prefix for MSP replies mirroring request operations; 'op' echoes the request op

data.op: string identifier echoing MSP request operation

client.<id>.summary: Per-client ad hoc topics; the literal topic matches the emitter id prefix
